top_signals.title: Modi Courts Indo-Pacific Partners as China, US Reshape Region
top_signals.summary: From missiles and uranium to critical minerals and sports diplomacy, Prime Minister Narendra Modi used a three-nation tour to deepen India’s Indo-Pacific partnerships as regional powers strengthen ties amid China’s growing influence and uncertainty over US engagement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed officials fret over inflation risk, weigh rate hikes - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Fed officials fret over inflation risk, weigh rate hikes  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Navy Chief Says US Needs More Warships
top_signals.summary: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle says the US Navy needs a larger fleet, faster shipbuilding and expanded munitions production to meet growing global demands while sustaining readiness across multiple theaters. He says the service remains prepared despite heavy operational commitments, points to record recruiting and retention, and argues rebuilding the US industrial base is critical to long-term national security. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Back to basics in an uncertain environment
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin, ether ETFs snap eight-week outflow streaks with $282 million combined inflow
top_signals.summary: The preceding eight weeks drained a combined $9.46 billion from the two groups, meaning this week’s rebound recovered only about 3% of those outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

alerts.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts

alerts.title: Dollar stablecoins could improve FX access but amplify currency runs: IMF paper
alerts.summary: An IMF working paper says dollar stablecoins can improve access to foreign currency but may also help coordinate exits from local currencies during periods of severe exchange-rate stress.
